Materials & Properties
Materials & Properties

Multiple rubber and sealing material solutions help you quickly identify the right compound based on oil resistance, temperature range, chemical exposure, and working conditions.

Quick Comparison Material Details Condition Guide

Quick Comparison

Material Comparison Matrix

Compare key material properties at a glance to shorten evaluation time for engineering and purchasing teams.

Material Oil Resistance Temperature Chemical Resistance 耐腐蚀性 Wear Resistance 耐磨性 Cost Typical Applications
NBR 丁腈橡胶
Excellent
-30°C to 100°C
 Moderate Good Low O-rings, oil seals, hydraulic seals
FKM / Viton 氟橡胶
Excellent
-20°C to 200°C
 Excellent Good High High-temperature oil seals, chemical equipment seals
Silicone 硅橡胶
Fair
-60°C to 200°C
 Good Fair Medium Food-grade seals, medical parts, special-environment sealing
HNBR 氢化丁腈橡胶
Excellent
-30°C to 150°C
 Good Excellent Medium-High Automotive systems, high-demand hydraulic seals
EPDM 三元乙丙橡胶
Weak
-40°C to 150°C
 Excellent Good Medium Outdoor sealing, water systems, steam environments
PU 聚氨酯
Good
-30°C to 100°C
 Moderate Excellent Medium Hydraulic seals, high-pressure dynamic sealing
CR 氯丁橡胶
Moderate
-30°C to 120°C
 Good Good Medium General industrial sealing, weather-resistant rubber parts

Material Profiles

Detailed Material Cards

Review properties, product fit, and industry recommendations for each major sealing compound.

Material

NBR

丁腈橡胶

A mainstream sealing material with strong oil resistance, balanced cost, and broad industrial applicability.

Key Features

  • Excellent oil resistance
  • Good wear resistance
  • Stable processing performance
  • Suitable for general industrial sealing

Temperature Range

-30°C to 100°C

Recommended Products

O-Rings Oil Seals Hydraulic Seals

Industries / Typical Scenarios

Mechanical equipment Automotive General industrial manufacturing
View Related Products

Material

FKM / Viton

氟橡胶

A high-performance elastomer for high temperature, fuel media, and harsh chemical environments.

Key Features

  • Excellent heat resistance
  • Strong chemical resistance
  • Outstanding fuel and oil compatibility
  • Suitable for severe operating conditions

Temperature Range

-20°C to 200°C

Recommended Products

High-temperature O-Rings Automotive Oil Seals Special Sealing Parts

Industries / Typical Scenarios

Petrochemical Automotive High-temperature equipment
View Related Products

Material

Silicone

硅橡胶

Known for wide temperature tolerance, softness, and insulation performance in special environments.

Key Features

  • Excellent high and low temperature range
  • Good environmental and electrical properties
  • Soft and elastic
  • Suitable for special environment sealing

Temperature Range

-60°C to 200°C

Recommended Products

Rubber products Special O-Rings Non-standard seals

Industries / Typical Scenarios

Electronics Medical support environments Food-related equipment
View Related Products

Material

HNBR

氢化丁腈橡胶

An upgraded NBR-class material with stronger heat, aging, and oil resistance for higher-end applications.

Key Features

  • Improved heat resistance over NBR
  • Excellent oil and aging resistance
  • Good mechanical strength
  • Suitable for high-demand industrial applications

Temperature Range

-30°C to 150°C

Recommended Products

Automotive oil seals Hydraulic seals Dynamic sealing parts

Industries / Typical Scenarios

Automotive Mechanical equipment Hydraulic systems
View Related Products

Material

EPDM

三元乙丙橡胶

A weather-resistant material suitable for water, steam, ozone, and outdoor applications, but not strong-oil environments.

Key Features

  • Excellent weather resistance
  • Strong ozone and steam resistance
  • Good outdoor durability
  • Not recommended for strong oil exposure

Temperature Range

-40°C to 150°C

Recommended Products

Rubber products Waterproof sealing parts General industrial seals

Industries / Typical Scenarios

Electrical appliances Outdoor equipment Water systems
View Related Products

Material

PU

聚氨酯

A highly wear-resistant sealing material favored in hydraulic, high-pressure, and dynamic motion environments.

Key Features

  • Excellent wear resistance
  • Strong support for high-pressure sealing
  • Suitable for dynamic motion
  • Good structural toughness

Temperature Range

-30°C to 100°C

Recommended Products

Hydraulic seals Y-Rings Dynamic sealing components

Industries / Typical Scenarios

Hydraulic equipment Mechanical equipment Heavy-duty manufacturing
View Related Products

Material

CR

氯丁橡胶

A balanced general-purpose elastomer with good weather resistance and flame-retardant characteristics.

Key Features

  • Good weather resistance
  • Flame-retardant character
  • Balanced general industrial performance
  • Suitable for protective and sealing parts

Temperature Range

-30°C to 120°C

Recommended Products

Rubber products Protective components General sealing parts

Industries / Typical Scenarios

General industrial manufacturing Electrical appliances Outdoor equipment
View Related Products

Working Condition Guide

Select Materials by Operating Condition

A quick decision aid for buyers and engineers who need to shortlist materials based on actual service conditions.

High Temperature

Recommended: FKM / Viton, Silicone

Suitable for high-temperature oil media, engine compartments, and long-duration thermal exposure.

Strong Oil Exposure

Recommended: NBR, HNBR

A practical choice for general industrial oil sealing and demanding lubricating media.

High Wear / High Pressure

Recommended: PU

Best matched with hydraulic and dynamic sealing systems that require strong wear resistance.

Outdoor / Waterproof / Anti-Aging

Recommended: EPDM

Well suited for outdoor exposure, water-related systems, and ozone-resistant applications.

General Industrial Sealing

Recommended: NBR

A cost-effective default option for broad sealing applications in manufacturing and maintenance.

Need Help Selecting?

Can’t Find the Right Material?

We provide material selection advice, size matching, and custom support for demanding sealing applications.
